how_to_use.title: Open a website
how_to_use.action: Open any website that requires authentication.
how_to_use.detail: Navigate to any site where you need to stay signed in — a SaaS dashboard, staging/UAT environment, internal admin panel, or AI chat such as ChatGPT, Claude, or DeepSeek.

how_to_use.title: Log in with a test account
how_to_use.action: Log in using any test account.
how_to_use.detail: Complete the normal login flow in your browser. Account Switcher captures the session state after you authenticate — no special setup or API keys required.

how_to_use.title: Open Account Switcher
how_to_use.action: Click the Account Switcher icon in your browser toolbar.
how_to_use.detail: The popup opens on the current tab's domain. If you have saved sessions for this site, you'll land on the session detail view automatically.
how_to_use.image_alt: Account Switcher popup showing the website grid with saved domains

how_to_use.title: Save the current session
how_to_use.action: Click Save Session (disk icon) in the popup header.
how_to_use.detail: This snapshots the current cookies, localStorage, and sessionStorage for the active website. Use it whenever you're logged in and want to preserve that account context.
how_to_use.image_alt: Save Session button and modal in the extension popup

how_to_use.title: Name your session
how_to_use.action: Enter a session name and confirm save.
how_to_use.detail: Give each session a recognizable label — e.g. "Admin UAT", "User A", or "ChatGPT Account 2". The first save for a domain also registers that website in your grid.
how_to_use.image_alt: Session name input when saving a new session

how_to_use.title: Add another account on the same site
how_to_use.action: Click Add Session (+ icon), log in with a different account, then Save Session again.
how_to_use.detail: Add Session clears the current browser state so you can sign in with another account on the same domain. Save each account as a separate named session — repeat for as many personas as you need.
how_to_use.image_alt: Add Session flow to create a second account on the same website

how_to_use.title: Switch sessions in one click
how_to_use.action: Open the website, go to its session detail, and pick a saved session.
how_to_use.detail: From the homepage grid, select a website to see all saved sessions. Click any session card — Account Switcher restores cookies and storage, reloads the tab, and you're instantly logged in as that account. No logout, no re-login.
how_to_use.image_alt: Session list for a website with multiple saved accounts

note: All session data is stored locally on your device via chrome.storage.local. Nothing is sent to external servers.
